M-072.NAME: premium-art-direction-system
M-072.owns: Premium Matrix/cyberpunk art direction across user, admin, public, and email-adjacent visual systems.
M-072.purpose: Raise KrotPN visual quality to a professional premium level while preserving compact operational usability.

exports.rule-premium-palette: Controlled Matrix green with cyan, magenta, amber, red, neutral, and deep black accents.
exports.rule-premium-type-scale: Readable display, UI, KPI, and monospace data typography scales for phones, tablets, and desktops.
exports.rule-premium-density: Compact spacing/radius/shadow rules that avoid bulky cards and nested panels.
exports.rule-premium-brand-usage: Logo placement, clear-space, size, contrast, and asset source rules.

constraints.constraint-1: Do not change backend APIs, auth behavior, VPN, billing, MTProto, deploy, install, nginx, or docker-compose.
constraints.constraint-2: Do not use oversized heroes, nested cards, decorative orbs, or one-note green/purple palettes.
constraints.constraint-3: Every premium token must remain readable under reduced-motion and low-performance device assumptions.

acceptance-metrics.metric-1: User and admin builds pass after token adoption.
acceptance-metrics.metric-2: Static smoke proves balanced palette, compact density, focus-visible states, reduced-motion rules, and logo rules.
acceptance-metrics.metric-3: Screenshot review confirms premium feel without hiding primary workflows.

execution-evidence.local-2026-06-03: Phase-55 added shared premium Matrix tokens to user/admin CSS, removed decorative radial/orb shell backgrounds, preserved compact radii/density, added logo/type/density variables, added scripts/phase55-premium-art-direction-smoke.mjs, passed user/admin builds, validated screenshot artifacts in /tmp/krotpn-phase55-screenshots, and kept deploy/install/runtime surfaces untouched.

M-072.hotspot: H-059: Premium Matrix art direction must feel distinctive without becoming decorative noise or a one-note neon palette.
